endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/managedInstances/{managedInstanceName}/databases/{databaseName}/securityAlertPolicies
endpoints.description: Gets a list of managed database's security alert policies.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{MANAGEDINSTANCENAME}} with a real managedinstancename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/managedInstances/{managedInstanceName}/databases/{databaseName}/securityAlertPolicies/{securityAlertPolicyName}
endpoints.description: Gets a managed database's security alert policy.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MANAGEDINSTANCENAME}} with a real managedinstancename. Replace {{SECURITYALERTPOLICYNAME}} with a real securityalertpolicyname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/managedInstances/{managedInstanceName}/databases/{databaseName}/securityAlertPolicies/{securityAlertPolicyName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates a database's security alert policy.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MANAGEDINSTANCENAME}} with a real managedinstancename. Replace {{SECURITYALERTPOLICYNAME}} with a real securityalertpolicyname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.
